mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, description, category, type, link_url AS resourceUrl, tags, view_count AS eyeCount, hic, source, created_at AS createdAt, content_url AS contentUrl FROM resources
AND source = REPLACE(#{source}, '"', '')
AND category =REPLACE(#{category}, '"', '')
AND type = REPLACE(#{type}, '"', '')
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%') )
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, tags)
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id LIMIT ${limit} OFFSET ${offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources
AND source = REPLACE(#{source}, '"', '')
AND category =REPLACE(#{category}, '"', '')
AND type = REPLACE(#{type}, '"', '')
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%') )
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, tags)
